	{"bbox_2d": [510, 181, 914, 211], "text_content": "The TPS562200 and TPS563200 are simple, easy-to-use, 2-A and 3-A synchronous step-down (buck) converters in 6-pin SOT-23 package."},
	{"bbox_2d": [510, 236, 914, 266], "text_content": "The devices are optimized to operate with minimum external component counts and also optimized to achieve low standby current."},
